strengths: 19 years of continuous software engineering experience across diverse domains and tech stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang, C++, cloud infrastructure)
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentorship through open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and multiple staff-level roles
Recent engagement with AI infrastructure work (AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators at re:cinq as of April 2025)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or products—only a vague, recent reference to 'AI-agent infrastructure' with no evidence of shipped AI systems or strategic AI innovation
Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in AI-related field, and no coursework or certifications in ML/AI appear in education or skills

No evidence of strategic advisory or customer-facing consulting experience—the role requires advising 'strategic customers and partners' on AI/cloud adoption, but resume shows only individual contributor and engineering leadership roles

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
Years of engineering experience (19 years total)
Strategic advisory and customer consulting experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled, experienced engineer with 19 years in software across diverse domains and strong mentorship credentials. However, this Principal Engineer role is explicitly about AI Strategy—requiring 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' The resume shows only a recent, vague mention of 'AI-agent infrastructure' at re:cinq (started April 2025) with no details of shipped AI products, ML systems, or strategic AI initiatives. Additionally, the role requires advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption—a capability not evidenced by his background as an individual contributor and technical leader. He would be a strong fit for a Staff Software Engineer or Technical Lead role leveraging his broad platform experience, but lacks the specialized AI expertise and strategic advisory track record this position demands.
